column1: C[matburt: bedtime for me... will pick it back up in the morning :)
C[kevin.enns: indeed...maybe I'll figure out how this game works by then :D
matburt: You are doing pretty good1
C[matburt: think we've about got this site to where we want to be... we're set to announce the full release on monday
C[kevin.enns: sweet!  maybe we'll finish this game one day :D
C[matburt: L13 group is going to bed dead for me for sure
matburt: we call that a failed invasion
C[kevin.enns: I'm still playing by intuition...no idea what'll happen next!

matburt: I'm going to pass... there aren't any more moves I can make... if you feel the same then we can move on to the stone removal phase to determine dead stones.  If we disagree in that phase then we can keep playing. If you don't feel the same then we can keep playing.
C[kevin.enns: I'm not entirely sure what is dead and what isn't
C[matburt: alrighty, well whenever you feel like not putting stones down anymore just click the pass button :)
C[kevin.enns: yeah, looks like nothing really left to do
